_comment: Authoritative AppMessage protocol definition. Single source of truth for generated Kotlin (phone) and C (watch) constants. Regenerate with scripts/generate-protocol.sh; never hand-edit the generated files (AGENTS.md rule 5). The keys/events/versions here MUST stay consistent with examples/protocol-definition.json (checked by scripts/check-protocol.py); this file additionally defines flag bits and maneuver codes that the watch and phone must agree on.
